import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { FiHome, FiPackage, FiUsers, FiFileText, FiUser, FiLogOut, FiMenu, FiX, FiSettings } from 'react-icons/fi'; function Navbar() { const [isLoggedIn, setIsLoggedIn] = useState(false); const [user, setUser] = useState(null); const [isMenuOpen, setIsMenuOpen] = useState(false); const [isProfileOpen, setIsProfileOpen] = useState(false); const navigate = useNavigate(); useEffect(() => { const token = localStorage.getItem('token'); const userData = localStorage.getItem('user'); if (token && userData) { setIsLoggedIn(true); setUser(JSON.parse(userData)); } }, []); const handleLogout = () => { localStorage.removeItem('token'); localStorage.removeItem('user'); setIsLoggedIn(false); setUser(null); setIsProfileOpen(false); navigate('/'); }; return (
{/* Logo */}
DealsDouble.ai
{/* Desktop Navigation */}
Home Products Suppliers Buy Requirements Trade Leads {isLoggedIn && ( <> Dashboard Post Product )}
{/* Right Side */}
{isLoggedIn ? (
{isProfileOpen && (

{user?.name}

{user?.email}

)}
) : ( <> Login Sign Up )} {/* Mobile Menu Button */}
{/* Mobile Menu */} {isMenuOpen && (
setIsMenuOpen(false)} > Home setIsMenuOpen(false)} > Products setIsMenuOpen(false)} > Suppliers setIsMenuOpen(false)} > Buy Requirements setIsMenuOpen(false)} > Trade Leads
)}
); } export default Navbar;
